role_title: Senior Specialist S&O, Integrations Strategy & Operations

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in strategy & operations, business operations/analytics, consulting, or a related field
Strong analytical skills (Excel/Google Sheets, SQL, Dashboarding Software required)
Experience with AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, workflow automation tools)
Experience working cross-functionally with technical and non-technical stakeholders
Demonstrated understanding for translating technical concepts to business solutions
Excellent written and verbal communication skills

scope.surface: Partner Integrations Strategy & Operations — New Verticals integrations lifecycle, developer platform, and provider ecosystem tooling
scope.business_model: marketplace / platform (B2B integrations for merchant/provider ecosystem)
primary_metrics_inferred: Operational efficiency (speed, quality, scalability of integrations)
Accuracy and actionability of efficiency metrics
Reduction in manual effort via automation/AI
Provider self-serve adoption and experience quality
core_responsibilities: Identify and solve operational inefficiencies across the integrations lifecycle, improving speed, quality, and scalability.
Analyze partner and internal signals to uncover trends, pain points, and opportunities for improvement.
Define, track, and evolve efficiency metrics, including accuracy, actionability, and owning the feedback loops that continuously improve our models.
Translate data and insights into clear recommendations and action plans.
Leverage AI tools to automate workflows, reduce manual work, and improve operational outcomes
Partner cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, Support, Integrations, and TAMs to implement process and tooling improvements.
Build and maintain dashboards, trackers, and reporting to monitor performance and inform decision-making.

green_flags: Clear team mission and reporting structure stated
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Role scope and responsibilities are specific and well-defined
red_flags: No specific cities listed for hybrid office requirement — unclear which offices are relevant to this role
No dashboarding software tools named specifically, despite being listed as required — candidate must infer what platforms are used

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title, comp range, and years of experience)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated as metrics)
location.cities_listed (no specific city tied to this role in JD body; left empty)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred as false from 'hybrid with some time in-office' language)
ambiguities: The JD states 'This role is expected to be hybrid with some time in-office' but does not specify which city or office is relevant — location.cities_listed left empty.

Compensation note says base salary is 'localized according to an employee's work location' and the stated range is the 'national base pay range' including Illinois and Colorado — actual pay may vary by location.

Nice-to-haves section: JD does not explicitly separate preferred from required qualifications in a dedicated 'preferred' section; all qualifications listed appear under 'Qualifications' and are treated as must-haves. The cultural/soft-skill bullets under 'We're excited about you because' are treated as implied must-haves rather than nice-to-haves since no explicit 'nice to have' section exists.
